title: Align Stack 3D zone bases without flattening volumes
description: Stack 3D zone volumes must keep enough height to contain their components, while avoiding a stair-step appearance caused by varying zone baseline placement. Align stack-zone bottoms to a shared base plane and keep each zone top/label tied to its enclosing member height.
decision_notes: Rejected the thin-slab approach for Stack 3D zones because zones still need to visually wrap their components.
For Stack 3D only, zone volumes now share a common bottom plane; each zone height extends upward to its original top so containment remains meaningful.
Zone labels remain above each zone top instead of following a stair-stepped center position.
